title: BrightSmile: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Gentle, modern dental care for the whole family. Clear prices, easy booking and a smile you will be proud of.
From routine check-ups to a full smile makeover, all under one calm roof.
cards: Thorough exams that catch small issues before they grow.
Brighten your smile safely with a treatment tailored to you.
Tooth-coloured fillings that blend in and last.
A friendly, fear-free first visit your child will remember fondly.
Replace missing teeth with natural-looking, lasting results.
Same-day appointments when sudden pain cannot wait.

sections.text: We take the time to explain every step, work gently and keep you relaxed from the waiting room to the chair.
No surprises on the invoice. We agree the plan and the cost before any treatment begins, so you stay in control.

sections.sub: From first call to a brighter smile, without the stress.
steps: Pick a time that suits you in under a minute.
We examine, listen and agree a clear plan.
Get treated gently and walk out confident.

sections.quote: I used to dread the dentist. The team at BrightSmile was so gentle and clear about costs that I actually look forward to my check-ups now.
sections.author: Sample Patient

sections.sub: Clear prices for every visit. The exact quote comes after your exam.

items: Yes, we welcome new patients of all ages and your first consultation is free.
We use gentle numbing and take our time, so most visits are comfortable and pain-free.
Will I know the price first?
Always. We agree a clear, itemised quote before any treatment begins.
Of course. We make first visits friendly and fun so kids feel at ease.
What if I have a dental emergency?
Call us and we will arrange a same-day appointment whenever possible.

sections.sub: Book your visit today and see how easy gentle dental care can be.

sections.tagline: Gentle, modern dental care with prices you know upfront. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // BrightSmile is a sample template with dummy content
